modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Benefits of using templates in Word

full_description_text: So, the user was asking about templates in Word. They wanna know why it's good to use them. They said something about saving time and making things look nice. But, they seemed a bit confused on the details.
short_description: Benefits of using templates in Word
description: So, the user was asking about templates in Word. They wanna know why it's good to use them. They said something about saving time and making things look nice. But, they seemed a bit confused on the details.
